name: Kyoei Security Service Co., Ltd.
summary: Kyoei Security Service Co., Ltd. engages in security guard and worker dispatching business in Japan. It offers worker dispatching services for access control, patrols, opening/closing hall management, key management, disaster prevention equipment monitoring, emergency response, traffic induction, toll collection, checkout machines handling, regulation monitoring, accident prevention, personal protection, acceptance of companies/office buildings/hospitals, commercial facilities information, firefighting and rescue activities, facility management and cleaning, etc. The company was founded in 1985 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
